title: King of Chinatown
writer: Herbert J. Biberman, Lillie Hayward, Irving Reis
actors: Anna May Wong, Akim Tamiroff, J. Carrol Naish
plot: Violence and death stalk the Chinese of a big American city, but one man, Dr. Chang Ling, and his daughter, Dr. Mary Ling, defy the racketeers who are responsible, and, against terrific odds, bring peace to their oppressed neighbors.
